name: Failed Communication to a Malicious Website
notes: This rule triggers when a failed communication to a malicious website has been made.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies
when any of Web Category (custom) are contained in any of Malicious Web Categories - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Web Category (custom), Source Address in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Web Category (custom), Source Address in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Failed Communication to a Malicious Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies
AND when any of Web Category (custom) are contained in any of Malicious Web Categories - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Web Category (custom), Source Address in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Failed Communication to a Malicious Website
Event description: Failed communication to a malicious website has been made.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
